runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI Retention Parity Validation

usageChecks.summary: Retention parity validation used a single low-volume Playwright pass only (sidebar + fullscreen). Separate Vercel usage dashboard verification remains required if this run is used as a release-facing gate.

notes: Covered surfaces: guest dashboard entry, AI sidebar retention, fullscreen AI workspace retention.
Validated Reporter and Analyst state persistence across chat switching in both sidebar and fullscreen contexts.
Skipped surfaces: general auth UI pack, observability/security pack, analyst/reporter non-retention workflows.
